introSection: Fun Mouse is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently owned and travelled by Irish showman Jonathan Perks. The ride has been stationed at Tramore Amusement Park since the 2021 season.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride originated from the Netherlands.

fullText:
Fun Mouse is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently owned and travelled by Irish showman Jonathan Perks. The ride has been stationed at Tramore Amusement Park since the 2021 season.

The ride originated from the Netherlands.
